Class MessageEnvelope

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.m2m.model.MessageEnvelope
public class MessageEnvelope extends Object
Wrapper for all machine-to-machine (M2M) communication between GTNet instances. Every HTTP request/response between peers is wrapped in a MessageEnvelope, providing:
  • Sender identification (sourceDomain)
  • Reply correlation (souceIdForReply links to the sender's message ID)
  • Message type and parameters (messageCode, gtNetMessageParamMap)
  • Optional arbitrary payload (JSON node for type-specific data like GTNet during handshake)

  • Constructor Details

    • MessageEnvelope

      public MessageEnvelope()

    • MessageEnvelope

      public MessageEnvelope(GTNet sourceGtNet, GTNetMessage gtNetMsg)

    • MessageEnvelope

      public MessageEnvelope(GTNet sourceGtNet, GTNetMessage gtNetMsg, boolean serverBusy)
      Creates a new MessageEnvelope with the source server's GTNet entry and busy status.
      Parameters:
      sourceGtNet - the GTNet entry of the sending server (converted to DTO to exclude tokens)
      gtNetMsg - the message to wrap
      serverBusy - whether the source server is currently busy
